definitions: Mohammed Al-Garni is a Saudi Arabian Paralympic athlete who competes mainly in category T51 wheelchair racing events.
He is known for winning multiple medals at the Paralympic Games, including gold in the 100m and 400m T51 events.
examples: Mohammed Al-Garni set a new world record in the T51 400m.
The crowd cheered as Mohammed Al-Garni crossed the finish line.
Mohammed Al-Garni is an inspiration to many aspiring athletes.
